@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	liblnk
-PORTVERSION=	20130202
+PORTVERSION=	20130304
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-alpha-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -14,9 +14,8 @@ LICENSE=	LGPL3
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-python
-USE_PKGCONFIG=	build
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
-USE_GNOME=	gnomehack
+USES=		pathfix
 USE_ICONV=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
